TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: a i pasakacedas tua vurangs (France) aicu a lizuk a didjun, siaya a Dijon nua vinurangsan (kai a vurangs). ngadan nua lizuk kasicuayan a pinapungadan aicu a didjun a kemasi tua divie (Divio) a puzaljuman i qinedatan nua lizuk. kakudan kir aicu a kir a tinaudan a vawa a quljimacilaw nua i eurup katua kasis (cr√®me de cassis). taigaku University of Burgundy √Čcole nationale des beaux-arts de Dijon Sciences Po Paris Agrosup Dijon Burgundy School of Business sipacacikelan kisiya a djalan pazangal aicu a ljaljevavavan a didjun tua kisiya a i vecekadan tua kadjalan a kisiya a kemasi tua paris a patje liyon katua maresey. izua uta a kisiya a djalan a pasamaza i didjun sa sema ljaljevavavan a Besan√ßon, a Belfort, a Nancy, a Switzerland, katua Italy. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: a i pasaka ¶…ôdas tua vuraŇčs (*ran ¶…ô) ai ¶u a …≠izuk a di…Čun, siaja a dijun nua vinuraŇčsan (kai a vuraŇčs). Ňčadan nua …≠izuk kasi ¶uajan a pinapuŇčadan ai ¶u a di…Čun a k…ômasi tua divi…ô (diviu) a puza éuman i qin…ôdatan nua …≠izuk. kakudan kir ai ¶u a kir a tinaudan a vawa a qu éima ¶i…≠aw nua i …ôurup katua kasis ( ¶r*m…ô d…ô ¶assis). taigaku univ…ôrsitj u* burgundj * ¶u…≠…ô natiuna…≠…ô d…ôs b…ôau*-arts d…ô dijun s ¶i…ôn ¶…ôs pu paris agrusup dijun burgundj s ¶huu…≠ u* busin…ôss sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an kisija a …Ča…≠an pazaŇča…≠ ai ¶u a éa é…ôvavavan a di…Čun tua kisija a i v…ô ¶…ôkadan tua ka…Ča…≠an a kisija a k…ômasi tua paris a pa ¶…ô …≠ijun katua mar…ôs…ôj. izua uta a kisija a …Ča…≠an a pasamaza i di…Čun sa s…ôma éa é…ôvavavan a b…ôsan*un, a b…ô…≠*urt, a nan ¶j, a switz…ôr…≠and, katua ita…≠j. == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: a i pasakacedas tua vurangs (France) aicu a lizuk a didjun, siaya a Dijon nua vinurangsan (kai a vurangs). ngadan nua lizuk kasicuayan a pinapungadan aicu a didjun a kemasi tua divie (Divio) a puzaljuman i qinedatan nua lizuk. kakudan kir aicu a kir a tinaudan a vawa a quljimacilaw nua i eurup katua kasis (cr√®me de cassis). taigaku University of Burgundy √Čcole nationale des beaux-arts de Dijon Sciences Po Paris Agrosup Dijon Burgundy School of Business sipacacikelan kisiya a djalan pazangal aicu a ljaljevavavan a didjun tua kisiya a i vecekadan tua kadjalan a kisiya a kemasi tua paris a patje liyon katua maresey. izua uta a kisiya a djalan a pasamaza i didjun sa sema ljaljevavavan a Besan√ßon, a Belfort, a Nancy, a Switzerland, katua Italy. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: a i pasaka ¶…ôdas tua vuraŇčs (*ran ¶…ô) ai ¶u a …≠izuk a di…Čun, siaja a dijun nua vinuraŇčsan (kai a vuraŇčs). Ňčadan nua …≠izuk kasi ¶uajan a pinapuŇčadan ai ¶u a di…Čun a k…ômasi tua divi…ô (diviu) a puza éuman i qin…ôdatan nua …≠izuk. kakudan kir ai ¶u a kir a tinaudan a vawa a qu éima ¶i…≠aw nua i …ôurup katua kasis ( ¶r*m…ô d…ô ¶assis). taigaku univ…ôrsitj u* burgundj * ¶u…≠…ô natiuna…≠…ô d…ôs b…ôau*-arts d…ô dijun s ¶i…ôn ¶…ôs pu paris agrusup dijun burgundj s ¶huu…≠ u* busin…ôss sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an kisija a …Ča…≠an pazaŇča…≠ ai ¶u a éa é…ôvavavan a di…Čun tua kisija a i v…ô ¶…ôkadan tua ka…Ča…≠an a kisija a k…ômasi tua paris a pa ¶…ô …≠ijun katua mar…ôs…ôj. izua uta a kisija a …Ča…≠an a pasamaza i di…Čun sa s…ôma éa é…ôvavavan a b…ôsan*un, a b…ô…≠*urt, a nan ¶j, a switz…ôr…≠and, katua ita…≠j. == kaizuan ==
